title: GridLauncher
author: mashers
description: 3DS Homebrew menu with fancy grids and cool customization features!
long_description: GridLauncher, originally created by mashers, is a fork of the original ninjhax Homebrew Launcher that adds a grid layout and extensive customization features for your homebrew experience. Now with Rosalina support!

boot.3dsx.message:
This will replace your existing
Homebrew Launcher (boot.3dsx). Continue?
